sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36055" key="e)nske/parnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνσκέπαρνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n36055.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">oblique,</tr_> of bandages, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:48:64:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">48.64.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
